root.speaker: Nighthawk
root.text: You there. You have the look of someone who woke up in the wrong life. Speak quickly — the fog has ears.

options.label: That face in the mirror wasn't mine.

who.speaker: Nighthawk
who.text: A watchman of the dark. We hunt what the Church is too proud to admit walks these streets.

org.speaker: Nighthawk
org.text: The Nighthawks answer to no parish. The Church of Evernight already moves on the notebook — and on whoever carries it.

notebook.speaker: Nighthawk
notebook.text: So you HAVE seen it. Antigonus' notebook. Keep it hidden, or it will hollow you out and wear you like a coat.

mirror.speaker: Nighthawk
mirror.text: Transmigration. The previous tenant didn't leave willingly. Whatever pulled you here wanted this body in the city — tonight.

effects.text: 线索：查清这具身体的前主人 (Learn who wore this body before you).
